questions.question: Which lesson in the Essentials Path is focused on learning how to share and collaborate?

options.explanation: Building basics covers navigation, blocks, databases and wikis, not sharing.
The title itself indicates the lesson teaches sharing and collaboration.
The quiz tests knowledge; it does not teach sharing.
One of the listed lessons does focus on sharing and collaboration.

questions.question: How long is the "Building basics" lesson?

options.explanation: The article lists 20 min, not 10 min.
The duration shown for Building basics is 20 min.
30 min is not mentioned for this lesson.
45 min is far longer than the listed time.

questions.question: Which of the following tags does NOT appear in the metadata for the "Sharing & collaboration" lesson?

options.explanation: The lesson is labeled as Beginner.
It is categorized as a Lesson.
Essentials is part of the path tags.
Advanced never appears; the lesson is for beginners.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the "Notion Essentials Quiz" lesson?

options.text: Earn a badge and test knowledge
options.explanation: The description says the quiz lets you earn a badge and assess your understanding.
Advanced database topics are not mentioned for the quiz.
Collaboration is covered in a different lesson, not the quiz.
Database building is part of the Building basics lesson.

questions.question: If a new user wants a quick overview of Notion's core features, which lesson should they prioritize and why?

options.text: "Building basics" because it covers navigation, blocks, custom databases, and wikis.
options.explanation: This lesson explicitly teaches the foundational building blocks of Notion.

options.text: "Sharing & collaboration" because it introduces team workflows.
options.explanation: While useful, it focuses on collaboration rather than core features.

options.text: "Notion Essentials Quiz" because it tests all knowledge at once.
options.explanation: The quiz assesses knowledge after learning; it doesn’t provide the overview itself.

options.text: None of the lessons; the user should read the Notion Help Center.
options.explanation: The path is designed to give a concise introduction, so a lesson is the best starting point.

questions.question: Considering the listed durations, which lesson provides the most instructional time?

options.explanation: It is the longest listed duration; the quiz has no duration listed.
15 min is shorter than 20 min.
No time is specified, so we cannot assume it’s longer.

options.text: All lessons are equal in length
options.explanation: Durations differ; Building basics is the longest.

questions.question: All lessons in the Essentials Path share which language setting?

options.explanation: Each lesson lists English as the language.
Spanish is not mentioned.
French is not listed.
German does not appear in the metadata.

questions.question: Which tag appears in both the "Building basics" and "Sharing & collaboration" lessons but is absent from the "Notion Essentials Quiz" lesson?

options.explanation: Both building and sharing lessons are marked Beginner, while the quiz does not include that tag.
Badged Path only appears with the quiz, not the first two lessons.
Essentials is present in all three lessons.
Lesson is also a tag on the quiz.
